variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17292 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17292 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17292 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 68.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 67.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 57.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 325.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 325.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 30 850/3 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17292
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 30 850/3 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17292
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 303.0 mm, Dimension B: 191.0 mm, Dimension C: 9.0 mm, Dimension H: 476.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27714 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17292
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF27714 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17292
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF27714 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
